def decodePage(in: List[int], inpos: Tuple[int], out: List[int], outpos: Tuple[int], thissize: int) -> None:
    tmpoutpos = outpos[0]
    tmpinpos = inpos[0]

    for run in range(thissize // BLOCK_SIZE):
        b = in[tmpinpos] & 0xFF
        cexcept = (in[tmpinpos] >> 8) & 0xFF
        exceptsize = (in[tmpinpos] >> 16)
        ++tmpinpos
        S16.uncompress(in, tmpinpos, exceptsize, exceptbuffer, 0, 2 * cexcept)
        tmpinpos += exceptsize
        for k in range(0, BLOCK_SIZE, 32):
            BitPacking.fastunpack(in, tmpinpos, out, tmpoutpos + k, bits[b])
            tmpinpos += bits[b]
        for k in range(cexcept):
            out[tmpoutpos + exceptbuffer[k + cexcept]] |= (exceptbuffer[k] << bits[b])
    outpos = (tmpoutpos,)
    inpos = (tmpinpos,)
```
